projects.title: ASL Translator
projects.description: Developed a web tool to translate real time camera inputs of ASL hand signals to the corresponding English letter.
projects.extraText: Take a look at the video demonstration on my Linkedin Post (click here)

projects.title: Travel Planning Assistant
projects.description: Constructed a AI assistant that helps users plan out their next vacation. Takes custom messages, prices, and locations to suggest the perfect tourist attractions.

projects.title: Seismic Detector
projects.description: Using large data analysis techniques contructed an algorithim to accurately detect seismic activity from more than 100gb of lunar data.
projects.linkText: Visit the website to read more about the tools me and Bacem used!

projects.title: Rubik's Cubes Solver
projects.description: Created a Rubik's cube solver. This project had a python based graphics user interface (GUI) created using python's Tkinter library. After the user enters the cube colors into the GUI and presses the start button, the combination of motors goees ahead and solves the cube!
